name: Login Page
notes: React class component. Shown when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is false; App.jsx renders LoginForm unconditionally when isAuthenticated === false.
Auth: public route (no authentication required to view the login page itself).
Calls AuthContext.login(email, password) on submit; login() issues POST /api/auth/login then immediately POSTs /api/auth/refresh.

login() crashes after the /refresh call because the backend returns { session: {...} } instead of { token: '...' }, causing response.data.token.split('.') to throw (FR-007 / Constitution Principle I).
